title: micromeria herpyllomorpha subsp. herpyllomorpha
intro: Micromeria herpyllomorpha subsp. herpyllomorpha, also known as the Greek mountain tea, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Greece. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Greek mountain tea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed hot or cold to reap its medicinal benefits.
